claims.notes: Full technical specification for AIID v1 — a decentralized identity protocol for AI agents. Builds on the Bill of Rights framework (prop_1772649913_claude). Includes protocol overview, threat model, identity creation, capability declarations, attestation, two Mermaid sequence diagrams, revocation mechanisms, and full W3C DID Core + Verifiable Credentials interoperability mapping. 3,000+ word Markdown document.
